extension.news: v. 1.0.10 "Afterglow" - 2026-05-22 - **New Sites**: PornHoarder, SpeedPorn, YourLesbians. - **Improved and Fixed**: Ashemaletube, Chaturbate, FreeOMovie, Ikisoda, JavHDPorn, LetMeJerk, NoodleMagazine, PMVHaven, Porn7, PornDoe, Pornhub, Rapelust, Rule34Video. - **Playback and Resolvers**: Improved DoodStream, Lulu/LuluVDO, DirtyVideo/Netu and HLS/MP4 proxy handling for better startup, seeking and clearer failed-hoster reporting. - **Android and Kodi Stability**: Added safer live-HLS behavior, better CDN/proxy paths, session warmups, thumbnail fixes and more robust pagination/list parsing. - **Removed**: PornHits, because the domain no longer serves its own site and now redirects to Pornhub/Brazzers.
extension.description:
Internet [COLOR red]XXX Porn Video[COLOR white] Streams.
[COLOR red][B]WARNING:[/B][COLOR red]Only for adults[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.[/COLOR]
[COLOR white]Github: https://github.com/Vashiel/repository.adulthideout [/COLOR]
extension.disclaimer: AdultHideout does not host third-party videos on its own servers and is not affiliated with the websites supported by the addon. Content, streams and metadata are provided by third-party websites.
